modules.description: Sort, dedupe, number, reshape lists and lines

scripts.name: Trim / Clean
scripts.description: Trim whitespace, remove blank lines, normalize spaces
scripts.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M9 7H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v8a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V9a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-4'/><path d='M9 7V3h6v4'/></svg>

scripts.name: Count Words
scripts.description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs
scripts.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M4 9h16'/><path d='M4 15h16'/><path d='M10 3 8 21'/><path d='M16 3 14 21'/></svg>

scripts.name: Quoter
scripts.description: Wrap items in quotes (comma or newline delimited, toggles off)
scripts.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M10 11c-1.5 0-3-1-3-3s1-3 3-3c1 0 2 .5 2 2'/><path d='M20 11c-1.5 0-3-1-3-3s1-3 3-3c1 0 2 .5 2 2'/></svg>

scripts.name: Toggle Todo
scripts.description: Toggle [ ]/[x] checkboxes on current or selected lines
scripts.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='3' y='3' width='18' height='18' rx='2'/><path d='M9 12l2 2 4-4'/></svg>

scripts.name: Convert Todo
scripts.description: Convert lines to a todo list, or revert a todo list back to bullets
scripts.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z'/><path d='M14 2v6h6'/><path d='M9 15l2 2 4-4'/></svg>

scripts.name: Timestamp
scripts.description: Insert current date and time
scripts.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='3' y='4' width='18' height='18' rx='2' ry='2'/><line x1='16' y1='2' x2='16' y2='6'/><line x1='8' y1='2' x2='8' y2='6'/><line x1='3' y1='10' x2='21' y2='10'/></svg>

scripts.name: Clean Quotes
scripts.description: Convert curly/typographic quotes to straight standard quotes
scripts.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M10 8c-2 0-3 1-3 3v1h2v-1c0-1 0-1 1-1'/><path d='M18 8c-2 0-3 1-3 3v1h2v-1c0-1 0-1 1-1'/></svg>

scripts.name: Align Comments
scripts.description: Pad inline comments so they line up across consecutive lines. Auto-detects Python (#) and JS (//) syntax.
scripts.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><line x1='3' y1='6' x2='21' y2='6'/><line x1='3' y1='12' x2='15' y2='12'/><line x1='3' y1='18' x2='18' y2='18'/></svg>

scripts.name: Round To
scripts.description: Round all decimal numbers to a specified number of decimal places
scripts.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='10'/><line x1='12' y1='8' x2='12' y2='12'/><line x1='12' y1='16' x2='12.01' y2='16'/></svg>

scripts.name: Copy Block
scripts.description: Copy the current contiguous block (to next blank line or end of doc) to clipboard
scripts.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='9' y='9' width='13' height='13' rx='2' ry='2'/><path d='M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1'/></svg>

scripts.name: Convert
scripts.description: Unit conversions: °F↔°C, in↔cm, ft↔m, mi↔km, lb↔kg, oz↔g, KB↔MB↔GB, and more
scripts.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M8 3L4 7l4 4'/><path d='M4 7h16'/><path d='M16 21l4-4-4-4'/><path d='M20 17H4'/></svg>

scripts.name: Clean Diary
scripts.description: Remove empty date entries from a @type: diary document
scripts.icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><polyline points='3 6 5 6 21 6'/><path d='M19 6l-1 14H6L5 6'/><path d='M10 11v6M14 11v6'/><path d='M9 6V4h6v2'/></svg>

modules.name: Clean & Restructure Pack
modules.description: Whitespace, list, table and code cleanup transforms

scripts.name: Strip Trailing Whitespace
scripts.description: Remove spaces and tabs from the end of every line

scripts.name: Collapse Blank Lines
scripts.description: Squeeze runs of blank lines down to a single blank line

scripts.name: Tabs → Spaces
scripts.description: Replace every tab with spaces (asks for width, default 4)

scripts.name: Spaces → Tabs
scripts.description: Convert leading space indentation to tabs (asks for width, default 4)

scripts.name: Straighten Quotes
scripts.description: Replace smart/curly quotes and dashes with plain ASCII ones

scripts.name: Sentence case
scripts.description: Lowercase everything, then capitalize the start of each sentence

scripts.name: Dedupe Lines (Ignore Case)
scripts.description: Remove duplicate lines, treating different cases as the same line

scripts.name: Sort by Column
scripts.description: Sort lines by the Nth column (asks for delimiter and column number)

scripts.name: Renumber Lists
scripts.description: Fix numbered lists so each run counts 1. 2. 3. again (indent-aware)

scripts.name: Fix Checkboxes
scripts.description: Normalize todo checkboxes: [] [ x ] [X] → [ ] and [x]

scripts.name: Normalize Unicode
scripts.description: NFC-normalize and strip zero-width/invisible characters

scripts.name: Remove ANSI Codes
scripts.description: Strip terminal color/escape sequences from pasted console output

scripts.name: CSV → Markdown Table
scripts.description: Turn comma-separated lines into a markdown table (first row = header)

scripts.name: Markdown Table → CSV
scripts.description: Turn a markdown table back into comma-separated lines

scripts.name: Sort JSON Keys
scripts.description: Pretty-print JSON with all object keys sorted alphabetically (recursive)

scripts.name: Align Colons
scripts.description: Align the values after 'key:' across consecutive lines (config/YAML style)

scripts.name: Prefix Lines…
scripts.description: Add a prefix to every line — or remove it if every line already has it

modules.name: Reminders
modules.description: Fire alerts from @remind!datetime!message tokens in your docs

modules.name: Text Stats
modules.description: Live word / character / reading-time stats with top words

modules.name: Dictionary
modules.description: Definitions, synonyms & antonyms (caches words for offline)

modules.name: Whiteboard
modules.description: Free-draw sketches; insert into the doc as an image

modules.name: Calendar Events
modules.description: Personal schedule: events synced across your devices

modules.name: RSS Feeds
modules.description: Follow RSS/Atom feeds; subscriptions & bookmarks sync across devices
